environment_prompt: An underground subway station platform. A dark arched tunnel entrance on the left side. Clean grey concrete platform with a bright yellow safety line along the edge. Fluorescent tube lights on the ceiling. An illuminated advertising lightbox on the wall. Well-lit, urban transit atmosphere. Deep inside the dark tunnel, a silver subway train is approaching along the tracks, its headlights not yet visible. The train interior is brightly lit with seated passengers ready to disembark.
perspective_prompt: First-person view, eye-level, standing on the platform looking along the tracks toward the tunnel entrance. Several passengers visible ahead on the platform.

interactions.action: Wind blows from the tunnel onto the platform.
The train pulls into the station.
